archetype: Electric & Neon / Jewel & Luxury (Dialed for Local Business Trust)

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Never use Inter or generic sans. Ensure tight letter spacing for large headers.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and small text. Prioritize readability.

typography.general: Do not default to bold for headers. Use black (font-black) for massive impact or light (font-light) for contrast.

rules: No full-screen gradients. Use massive, heavily blurred (blur-3xl) colored orbs behind sections for ambient lighting.
Never use pure black without text contrast. Tinted greys (e.g. zinc) ensure dark backgrounds feel premium, not muddy.
Only use the primary accent (Cyan) for CTAs and interactive triggers. Limit its use elsewhere.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Use for the sticky navbar and floating action items.
visual_enhancers.cards: bg-zinc-900/40 border border-white/10 hover:border-white/30 transition-colors duration-300.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 to-purple-500 sparingly, only on key H2 phrases.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] on primary CTA buttons. Consider the 'Tracing Beam' effect for high-conversion pricing/value cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle CSS noise/grain overlay class to the main background to eliminate the digital flatness.

layouts_and_grids.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-8 or p-12) to prevent text collision.
layouts_and_grids.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Left-aligned heavy typography (max-w-3xl) with an overlapping glowing abstract visual on the right. min-h-[90vh] flex items-center.
layouts_and_grids.bento_grid: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Span Logic: The Hero: col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2. The Square: col-span-4 row-span-1. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly; leave empty cells for offset alignment.
layouts_and_grids.alignment: Mobile-first grids. Left-align typography in dense content, cards, and paragraphs. Only center-align section titles if it creates tension.

cta_button.style: bg-cyan-500 text-black font-extrabold px-10 py-5 rounded-full transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] flex items-center gap-2
cta_button.behavior: External link to PayPal payment ($99). Must have data-testid='buy-now-button'.

accordion_faq.style: border-b border-white/10 py-6. Summary text text-xl font-medium cursor-pointer flex justify-between items-center. Use raw div with motion.div for dropdown.

testimonial_card.style: Glassmorphism or flat dark card, rounded-2xl, p-8. Includes a 48x48 rounded-full avatar, 5 gold stars (Lucide Star fill-current), and text-lg italic body text.

sections_breakdown.name: Sticky Header
sections_breakdown.description: Crystal Glassmorphism nav. Brand logo 'GEO Boost Engine' on left. Small CTA button 'Get My Report' on right.

sections_breakdown.name: Hero Section
sections_breakdown.description: Massive H1 ('AI Won\'t Recommend You Unless You Tell It How'). Subheadline addressing the local business pain point. Two buttons: Primary ($99 Report) and Secondary (How it works). Background uses a dark abstract glowing map overlay.

sections_breakdown.name: Problem Agitation (The Gap)
sections_breakdown.description: 3 staggered cards explaining why traditional SEO is dead and AI Search (ChatGPT, Google AI, Bing) is the new reality. Use subtle red/orange glows for danger.

sections_breakdown.name: How It Works (3 Steps)
sections_breakdown.description: Vertical timeline with connecting lines. 1: Scan footprint. 2: Inject data into AI. 3: Dominate AI recommendations. Use large numbered typography (text-8xl text-white/5 font-black) behind the text.

sections_breakdown.name: What You Get (Bento Grid)
sections_breakdown.description: Tetris Bento layout for the $99 report deliverables. e.g., 'Custom AI Prompts', 'Local Optimization Checklist', 'Competitor Gap Analysis'.

sections_breakdown.name: Social Proof
sections_breakdown.description: Testimonials from local business owners (HVAC, Med Spa) who saw increased calls after GEO Boost.

sections_breakdown.name: Value Stack
sections_breakdown.description: Split comparison layout. 'Agency Retainer: $2000/mo' vs 'GEO Boost Engine: One-time $99'. High contrast, highlighting the insane value. Highlight the $99 box with a glowing border.

sections_breakdown.name: Final CTA
sections_breakdown.description: Centered block with massive background gradient orb (cyan to purple). Final push to buy. Includes scarcity text ('Reports are hand-verified. Limited to 50 per week.').

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use framer-motion for fade-up and slight translate-y on scroll (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 30 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}).
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Micro-interactions on hover. Active scale-down. Transition transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interactions.ambient: Slow CSS pulse or floating animation on background blur orbs to simulate 'AI thinking'. Add pointer-events-none.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-zinc-300 has a minimum 4.5:1 ratio against #0A0A0A. Use text-white for headings.
accessibility.interactive: Focus states must have ring-2 ring-cyan-500. Add aria-expanded to FAQ accordions.
accessibility.testing: All buttons, links, and form inputs MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

images.description: Abstract glowing city map. Use as absolute positioned background with opacity-20 and mix-blend-screen.
Professional local business owner avatar. Use inside a rounded-full img tag.
Professional local business owner avatar 2. Use inside a rounded-full img tag.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Suggested: Sparkles, BrainCircuit, TrendingUp, MapPin, Zap, Crosshair, Plus, Minus, Star, CheckCircle2.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React app using .js / .jsx extensions ONLY (no .tsx).

Use standard HTML structure combined with Tailwind CSS. Avoid relying heavily on rigid Shadcn structural components for this creative layout; use raw HTML/Tailwind for the heavy lifting, grids, and hero sections.
Install and import 'framer-motion' for scroll reveal animations.
Install and import 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' exactly as specified, utilizing col-span and row-span to create asymmetry.
Ensure the hero CTA directly links to a payment checkout URL (e.g., href='https://paypal.com/ncp/payment/YOUR_ID' or placeholder) and doesn't trap the user in an unnecessary form.
Include Google Fonts via index.html or index.css (@import) for 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
Apply data-testid to every button and interactive element.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; use bg-black/60 and backdrop-blur-xl.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic AI outputs. Make the frontend distinctive with the defined fonts, high contrast, and generous spacing.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism (backdrop-blur 12-24px).
Do not apply 'transition: all'. Apply transitions specifically to transform, opacity, colors, box-shadow.
Do not center align the root .App container in CSS. This ruins left-aligned reading flow.
Use modern pill-shaped or rounded-full buttons for primary CTAs.
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover, active states). Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (e.g., py-24 or py-32 for sections).
Always use the provided image URLs; never use placeholder text for images or logos.
